SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DoctorId], [a].[IsActive], [a].[Notes], [a].[OrganizationId], [a].[PatientId], [a].[Status], [a].[TokenNumber], [a].[Type], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[AppointmentDate], [d0].[Id], [d0].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d0].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d0].[CreatedAt], [d0].[ExperienceYears], [d0].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d0].[FollowupFeeTele], [d0].[IsActive], [d0].[OrganizationId], [d0].[Qualification], [d0].[RegistrationNumber], [d0].[Specialization], [d0].[UpdatedAt], [d0].[UserId], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[FirstName], [u2].[IsActive], [u2].[LastName], [u2].[OrganizationId], [u2].[PasswordHash], [u2].[Phone], [u2].[RefreshToken], [u2].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u2].[Role], [u2].[SelectedClinicId], [u2].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[Id], [c0].[Address], [c0].[Code], [c0].[ContactEmail], [c0].[ContactPhone], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[Name], [c0].[OrganizationId], [c0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [a].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Address], [c].[Code], [c].[ContactEmail], [c].[ContactPhone], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[IsActive], [c].[Name], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [a].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [a].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_0 AND [a].[AppointmentDate] = @__request_Date_Value_1
ORDER BY [a].[AppointmentDate], [a].[TokenNumber]

) AS [c0] ON [i].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]

FROM [Invoices] AS [i]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Address], [c].[Code], [c].[ContactEmail], [c].[ContactPhone], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[IsActive], [c].[Name], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [i].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [i].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [i].[PrescriptionId] = [p2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i0].[Id], [i0].[CreatedAt], [i0].[Description], [i0].[InvoiceId], [i0].[IsActive], [i0].[ItemType], [i0].[OrganizationId], [i0].[Quantity], [i0].[TotalPrice], [i0].[UnitPrice], [i0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [InvoiceItems] AS [i0]
) AS [i1] ON [i].[Id] = [i1].[InvoiceId]
WHERE [i].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [i].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [i].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1
ORDER BY [i].[InvoiceDate] DESC, [i].[Id] DESC, [c0].[Id], [p0].[Id], [u0].[Id], [p2].[Id]

    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [p].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[Address], [s].[AlternatePhone], [s].[BankAccountNumber], [s].[BankName], [s].[City], [s].[ContactPerson], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Email], [s].[GSTNumber], [s].[IFSCCode], [s].[IsActive], [s].[Name], [s].[Notes], [s].[OrganizationId], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[Phone], [s].[PinCode], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Suppliers] AS [s]
) AS [s0] ON [p].[SupplierId] = [s0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p].[ApprovedByUserId] = [u0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [p].[ReceivedByUserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DiscountAmount], [p0].[ExpiryDate], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[MedicineId], [p0].[Notes], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PurchaseOrderId], [p0].[Quantity], [p0].[ReceivedQuantity], [p0].[TotalPrice], [p0].[UnitPrice], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c2].[Id] AS [Id0], [c2].[ClinicId], [c2].[ClinicId1], [c2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [c2].[Description], [c2].[GenericName], [c2].[GlobalMedicineId], [c2].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c2].[Manufacturer], [c2].[Name], [c2].[OrganizationId] AS [OrganizationId0], [c2].[Potency], [c2].[PurchasePrice], [c2].[SellingPrice], [c2].[Type], [c2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [PurchaseOrderItems] AS [p0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[ClinicId], [c1].[ClinicId1], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[Description], [c1].[GenericName], [c1].[GlobalMedicineId], [c1].[IsActive], [c1].[Manufacturer], [c1].[Name], [c1].[OrganizationId], [c1].[Potency], [c1].[PurchasePrice], [c1].[SellingPrice], [c1].[Type], [c1].[UpdatedAt]
        FROM [ClinicMedicines] AS [c1]
    ) AS [c2] ON [p0].[MedicineId] = [c2].[Id]
) AS [s1] ON [p].[Id] = [s1].[PurchaseOrderId]
WHERE [p].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[UserId], [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt], [d].[Qualification], [d].[Specialization], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive]
FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[LastName]

FROM [Invoices] AS [i]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Address], [c].[Code], [c].[ContactEmail], [c].[ContactPhone], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[IsActive], [c].[Name], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [i].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[ConsultationId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[InternalNotes], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IssuedDate], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientInstructions], [p].[PrescriptionNumber], [p].[Status], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [i].[PrescriptionId] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[AppointmentId], [c1].[AppointmentId2], [c1].[ChiefComplaint], [c1].[ConsultationDate], [c1].[ConsultationFee], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[Diagnosis], [c1].[DoctorId], [c1].[DoctorProfileId], [c1].[Examination], [c1].[IsActive], [c1].[Notes], [c1].[OrganizationId], [c1].[PatientId], [c1].[PatientId1], [c1].[Symptoms], [c1].[TreatmentPlan], [c1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Consultations] AS [c1]
) AS [c2] ON [p0].[ConsultationId] = [c2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c2].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
WHERE [i].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [i].[InvoiceDate] >= @__startDate_1 AND [i].[InvoiceDate] <= @__endDate_2 AND [i].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [i].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_3

    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]

FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DoctorId], [u0].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u0].[LastName] AS [DoctorName], [d].[ClinicId], [c0].[Name] AS [ClinicName], [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime], [d].[EndTime], [d].[IsActive], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [DoctorAvailabilities] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[Id], [d0].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DoctorId], [u0].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u0].[LastName] AS [DoctorName], [d].[ClinicId], [c0].[Name] AS [ClinicName], [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime], [d].[EndTime], [d].[IsActive], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [DoctorAvailabilities] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[Id], [d0].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND EXISTS (

    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DoctorId], [u0].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u0].[LastName] AS [DoctorName], [d].[ClinicId], [c0].[Name] AS [ClinicName], [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime], [d].[EndTime], [d].[IsActive], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[UpdatedAt]

INNER JOIN (

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DoctorId], [u0].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u0].[LastName] AS [DoctorName], [d].[ClinicId], [c0].[Name] AS [ClinicName], [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime], [d].[EndTime], [d].[IsActive], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [DoctorAvailabilities] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[Id], [d0].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[UserId], [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt], [d].[Qualification], [d].[Specialization], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive]
FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[LastName]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DoctorId], [u0].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u0].[LastName] AS [DoctorName], [d].[ClinicId], [c0].[Name] AS [ClinicName], [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime], [d].[EndTime], [d].[IsActive], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [DoctorAvailabilities] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[Id], [d0].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DoctorId], [a].[IsActive], [a].[Notes], [a].[OrganizationId], [a].[PatientId], [a].[Status], [a].[TokenNumber], [a].[Type], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[AppointmentDate], [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [a].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Address], [c].[Code], [c].[ContactEmail], [c].[ContactPhone], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[EveningEndTime], [c].[EveningStartTime], [c].[FullDayEndTime], [c].[FullDayStartTime], [c].[IsActive], [c].[MorningEndTime], [c].[MorningStartTime], [c].[Name], [c].[OperatingHoursType], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [a].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]

    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]

    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]

[d0].[UpdatedAt], [d0].[UserId], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[FirstName], [u2].[IsActive], [u2].[LastName], [u2].[OrganizationId], [u2].[PasswordHash], [u2].[Phone], [u2].[RefreshToken], [u2].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u2].[Role], [u2].[SelectedClinicId], [u2].[UpdatedAt], [p3].[Id], [p3].[ClinicMedicineId], [p3].[CreatedAt], [p3].[Dosage], [p3].[Duration], [p3].[Frequency], [p3].[Instructions], [p3].[IsActive], [p3].[MedicineId], [p3].[MedicineName], [p3].[OrganizationId], [p3].[PrescriptionId], [p3].[Quantity], [p3].[TotalPrice], [p3].[UnitPrice], [p3].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[AppointmentId], [c].[ChiefComplaint], [c].[ConsultationDate], [c].[ConsultationFee], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Diagnosis], [c].[DoctorId], [c].[Examination], [c].[IsActive], [c].[Notes], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[PatientId], [c].[Symptoms], [c].[TreatmentPlan], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [p].[ConsultationId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DoctorId], [a].[IsActive], [a].[Notes], [a].[OrganizationId], [a].[PatientId], [a].[Status], [a].[TokenNumber], [a].[Type], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[AppointmentDate]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c0].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p0]
) AS [p1] ON [c0].[PatientId] = [p1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c0].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p2].[Id], [p2].[ClinicMedicineId], [p2].[CreatedAt], [p2].[Dosage], [p2].[Duration], [p2].[Frequency], [p2].[Instructions], [p2].[IsActive], [p2].[MedicineId], [p2].[MedicineName], [p2].[OrganizationId], [p2].[PrescriptionId], [p2].[Quantity], [p2].[TotalPrice], [p2].[UnitPrice], [p2].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [PrescriptionItems] AS [p2]
) AS [p3] ON [p].[Id] = [p3].[PrescriptionId]
WHERE [p].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c0].[DoctorId] = @__request_DoctorId_Value_2 AND [p].[IssuedDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [p].[IssuedDate] <= @__endDateTime_4
ORDER BY [p].[IssuedDate] DESC, [p].[CreatedAt] DESC, [p].[Id], [c0].[Id], [a0].[Id], [p1].[Id], [u0].[Id], [d0].[Id], [u2].[Id]

    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId]

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]

    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DoctorId], [a].[IsActive], [a].[Notes], [a].[OrganizationId], [a].[PatientId], [a].[Status], [a].[TokenNumber], [a].[Type], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[AppointmentDate]

) AS [a0] ON [c0].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p0]
) AS [p1] ON [c0].[PatientId] = [p1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c0].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]

    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p2].[Id], [p2].[CreatedAt], [p2].[Dosage], [p2].[Duration], [p2].[Frequency], [p2].[Instructions], [p2].[IsActive], [p2].[MedicineId], [p2].[MedicineName], [p2].[OrganizationId], [p2].[PrescriptionId], [p2].[Quantity], [p2].[TotalPrice], [p2].[UnitPrice], [p2].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [PrescriptionItems] AS [p2]
) AS [p3] ON [p].[Id] = [p3].[PrescriptionId]

) AS [u2] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]

) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = @__request_IsActive_Value_1 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_2 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[LastName]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[UserId], [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt], [d].[Qualification], [d].[Specialization], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive]
FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[LastName]

    SELECT [d0].[Id], [d0].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

) AS [p0] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]

    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[UserId], [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt], [d].[Qualification], [d].[Specialization], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive]
FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = @__request_IsActive_Value_1 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_2 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[LastName]
